3165400.name: Just Stop!
3165400.description:
Just Stop! is a simple yet challenging game with one core mechanic: click a single button at the perfect moment to advance to the next level. Each level features a timer and designated "win zones," with configurations that change as you progress. The difficulty increases the further you go.

While the mechanics are straightforward, completing all levels is a test few will conquer. Do you have what it takes to finish from start to end?

To refine your skills, you can skip every 10 levels to practice the harder challenges. However, to claim true victory, you must complete the game from the beginning.

Good luck, and godspeed!
3165400.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
